/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libzmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/zmr_interfaces/msg/current_future_states__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/zmr_interfaces/srv/get_other_robot_states__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zmr_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/zmr_interfaces/srv/get_robot_state__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
